name: SHORT-RIB POLYDACTYLY SYNDROME
definition: group of autosomal recessive disorders characterized by short limb dysplasia, constricted SALDINO-NOONAN SYNDROME MAJEWSKI TYPE
discriminating_features: pointed femurs at both ends (type I); widened metaphyses (type III)
distorted underossified vertebral bodies + incomplete coronal clefts

general: pointed femurs at both ends (type I); widened metaphyses (type III)
distorted underossified vertebral bodies + incomplete coronal clefts
